column1: # Sweep nano_s13 — EMA decay sweep on Nano (2026-04-22)
# PURPOSE: 0.995 is our locked value but we've never cleanly tested alternatives.
# At Nano's σ≈0.003-0.006 @ 180 steps, Δ≥0.005 is detectable with 2 seeds.
# α=1.0 confirmed optimal in s12 → use pure EMA, just vary the decay rate.
# Full training decay at 180 steps is effectively: e^(180*ln(decay))
#   0.990 → 16% original weight after 180 steps (fast-tracking, favors recent)
